title: Two jewellers arrested for cheating man of 101 grams of gold with false promise of high returns
fullText: Two individuals were arrested by the Goshamahal police for cheating a man of 101 grams of pure gold by luring him with promises of unusually high daily returns.The accused were identified as Mohammed Arshad, 44, a businessman residing at Al Madina Colony, Reinbazar, and Mohd Adnan Ahmed alias Adnan, 39, a businessman from Naseeb Nagar, Chandrayangutta. Two others, identified as Mohammed Rasheed alias Haseeb and Shabbir, currently remain at large. Published - March 03, 2026 11:44 pm IST
